description: Lecture discussing adverse selection in markets, particularly in health insurance and labor markets. It explains how asymmetric information affects market dynamics and leads to potential market failures.
topic_summary: The lecture covers adverse selection, starting with the market for lemons [t=0:64]. It illustrates how health insurance companies face challenges due to asymmetric information about individual health [t=19:52]. The discussion extends to labor markets and online advertising [t=262.88].
